pr.title: Anna & Will Wedding Website — Congress Hall, Cape May
pr.body:
## Summary

Complete wedding website for Anna & Will's wedding at Congress Hall, Cape May, NJ. This is a standalone static site (HTML/CSS/JS) located in `wedding-website/`.

### What's Included

| Section | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Hero** | Full-screen landing with live countdown timer and RSVP button |
| **Our Story** | Couple's narrative with animated timeline |
| **The Venue** | Congress Hall info + embedded YouTube video tour of Cape May |
| **3-Day Itinerary** | Friday welcome dinner, Saturday ceremony/reception, Sunday brunch |
| **Wedding Party** | Bios for Anna, Will, and Peter Lehman |
| **Travel** | Airport, driving, lodging, and local transport info |
| **Registry** | Honeymoon fund, Crate & Barrel, Zola (placeholder links) |
| **FAQ** | 8 questions with expandable accordion |
| **RSVP** | Full form with client-side validation |

### Bio Highlights
- **Anna Lehman** — Lehigh two-sport D1 athlete. Humorous take on her lacrosse career (8 games, 2 shots, 1 on goal as a freshman — \"all about the intangibles\"). Also started all 18 field hockey games, scored a go-ahead goal at Lafayette (against Peter's school!)
- **Peter Lehman** — Lafayette lacrosse legend: 3x captain, 105 career goals (8th all-time), 152 career points, Patriot League Rookie of the Year, 2x All-Patriot League, iconic buzzer-beater vs BU that won PARDees Top Play

### Technical
- Pure HTML/CSS/JS — no build tools needed
- Fully responsive (mobile/tablet/desktop)
- Accessible (ARIA labels, `prefers-reduced-motion`, semantic HTML)
- Deploy to GitHub Pages, Netlify, or any static host

![Hero Screenshot](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..AdqDafpXszYujfu6Lr2zEp5peFstpoBbwKQMh1peX38)

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human
- [ ] Review Anna's and Peter's bios for accuracy; edit personal details as needed
- [ ] Confirm wedding date (currently September 19, 2026 in `script.js`)
- [ ] Replace monogram placeholders with real photos
- [ ] Update registry links to real registries
- [ ] Add Congress Hall room block code in Travel section
- [ ] Wire RSVP form to a backend (Formspree, Google Forms, etc.)
- [ ] Deploy to hosting for public access

### Notes
- YouTube video: \"Cape May, NJ — An Insider Tour\" (49K views, 12 min)
- Peter's bio sources: GoLeopards.com roster, Lafayette student newspaper buzzer-beater article, PARDees award
- To deploy: create a new repo with just the 3 files from `wedding-website/`, enable GitHub Pages
- RSVP currently logs to console — needs backend integration for production

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/3b3e1e46a8bf4a16a6d46560637fe712
Requested by: @willmccarthy8
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
